arts.ttl: Belgian media lauds Celtic Park as 'one of the seven wonders of football world'
arts.sum: A prominent Belgian media outlet has explored the role Celtic Park itself could play in Wednesday's UEFA Champions League encounter in Glasgow's east end

arts.ttl: Three Club Brugge players Brendan Rodgers must shackle in Champions League Celtic Park clash
arts.sum: Tzolis has scored 75 career goals and created 25 in 189 appearances and will be looking to add to that tonight at Celtic Park . However, there are three Brugge players who are on fire this season that Brendan Rodgers must keep an eye on at Celtic Park as 67 Hail Hial profiles the Belgian side’s goal threat.

arts.ttl: Gordon Dalziel hails the 'absolutely brilliant' Celtic man who Brendan Rodgers should start every week
arts.sum: Later, he added: “If Celtic play in their biggest game, that will probably start tomorrow night (vs Club Brugge) to get these three points that would put them in an unbelievable position, and he (Rodgers) plays his strongest team, Hatate is starting in that strongest team. On that note, Gordon Dalziel has pointed to the Bhoys figure he believes would always make their strongest side despite the unwarranted criticism he has received in the past from some quarters.

arts.ttl: Peter Grant says Celtic star can't get 'any minutes' under Brendan Rodgers despite doing 'nothing wrong'
arts.sum: “You have got your centre-forwards performing, Adam Idah coming on and scoring,” said Grant. Peter Grant says Luke McCowan has done ‘nothing wrong’ at Celtic

arts.ttl: John McGinn makes it clear how Celtic will fare against Club Brugge, highlights dangermen
arts.sum: Boyhood Celtic fan John McGinn has already faced the Belgian club – Brugge ended Aston Villa’s 100% start in the Champions League by beating them 1-0 before the international break. Celtic will be looking to continue their strong start in the Champions League on Wednesday night when they host Club Brugge.

arts.ttl: Kris Boyd in total Rangers write off as Celtic handed the title before Philippe Clement told what to 'worry' about
arts.sum: Boyd has recently gone public in his criticism for under-fire Ibrox boss Philippe Clement

arts.ttl: Club Brugge star says Celtic Champions League rivals must top their Aston Villa win to get anything at Parkhead
arts.sum: But like I said, these are the games that you want to play as a player, and we just have to stay calm, embrace these kind of feelings and just perform on the pitch. And in Milan, but also in the games again against Aston Villa and Dortmund, they were at a very good level.

arts.ttl: Celtic vs Club Brugge: TV channel, kick-off time, team news, referee & VAR
arts.sum: So with that in mind, below 67 Hail Hail tells you all you need to know about the Celtic vs Club Brugge game including how to watch it on TV, the latest team news, the appointed officials and more. Champions League football returns for the Celtic fans this week as Brendan Rodgers’ team entertains Club Brugge.

arts.ttl: Rod Stewart takes Rangers finances jab as Ally McCoist pleads for Celtic diehard to 'calm down' on air
arts.sum: The rocker couldn't resist trolling the Ibrox hero while discussing the Hoops' Champions League campaign

arts.ttl: Club Brugge boss shows Brendan Rodgers admiration as his side prepare to face 'quite complete' Celtic
arts.sum: Club Brugge boss Nicky Hayen has spoken out ahead of his side’s clash against Celtic in matchday five of the Champions League league phase. He explained: “You see that he’s a coach who really wants to play football, even from the back.
